languages.text:
The user can perform only basic attacks with two-handed weapons in this hand.
Traumas does not disable this augment but reduce max hit chance by an additional -5%

traits.locale_text:
The user can perform only basic attacks with two-handed weapons in this hand.
Traumas does not disable this augment but reduce max hit chance by an additional -5%

languages.text:
The user can perform only basic attacks with two-handed weapons in this hand.
When the user suffers a trauma, this augment does not malfunction, but the user's maximum hit chance is reduced by −5%.
languages.original_text:
The user can perform only basic attacks with two-handed weapons in this hand.

traits.locale_text:
All attacks with this augment are made with a −15% maximum hit chance penalty.
If the arm is crippled, the augment does not malfuntion; but the penalty is doubled.

The user deals can perform only basic attacks with two-handed weapons in this hand.
When the user suffers a trauma, this augment does not malfunction, but the user's maximum hit chance is reduced by −5%.

The user deals −15% less damage and can perform only basic attacks with two-handed weapons in this hand.
When the user suffers a trauma, this augment does not malfunction, but the user's maximum hit chance is reduced by −5%.

All attacks with this {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}augment{/g} are made with a −15% {g|Encyclopedia:MaxHitChance}maximum hit chance{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g}.
If the arm is crippled, the augment does not malfunction; but the penalty is doubled.

languages.text:
Обладатель аугмента может совершать только обычные атаки двуручным оружием, экипированным в этой руке.
Когда обладатель аугмента получает травму, этот аугмент не выходит из строя, но максимальный шанс попадания обладателя аугмента снижается на 5%.
languages.original_text:
The user deals can perform only basic attacks with two-handed weapons in this hand.
When the user suffers a trauma, this augment does not malfunction, but the user's maximum hit chance is reduced by −5%.

traits.locale_text:
Обладатель аугмента может совершать только обычные атаки двуручным оружием, экипированным в этой руке.
Когда обладатель аугмента получает травму, этот аугмент не выходит из строя, но максимальный шанс попадания обладателя аугмента снижается на 5%.

Обладатель аугмента наносит на 15% меньше урона и может совершать только обычные атаки двуручным оружием, экипированным в этой руке.
Когда обладатель аугмента получает травму, этот аугмент не выходит из строя, но максимальный шанс попадания обладателя аугмента снижается на −5%.

languages.text:
使用者这只手持有的双手武器只能进行普通攻击。
使用者遭受创伤时，此植入物不会失效，但使用者的最大命中率降低5%。
languages.original_text:
The user can perform only basic attacks with two-handed weapons in this hand.
When the user suffers a trauma, this augment does not malfunction, but the user's maximum hit chance is reduced by −5%.

traits.locale_text:
使用者造成的伤害降低15%，且这只手持有的双手武器只能进行普通攻击。
使用者遭受创伤时，此植入物不会失效，但使用者的最大命中率降低5%。

languages.text:
L'utilisateur peut lancer uniquement des attaques de base avec les armes à deux mains de cette main.
Si l'utilisateur subit un traumatisme, cette augmentation n'a pas de défaillance, mais ses chances maximum de toucher sont réduites de −5 %.
languages.original_text:
The user deals can perform only basic attacks with two-handed weapons in this hand.
When the user suffers a trauma, this augment does not malfunction, but the user's maximum hit chance is reduced by −5%.

traits.locale_text:
L'utilisateur peut lancer uniquement des attaques de base avec les armes à deux mains de cette main.
Si l'utilisateur subit un traumatisme, cette augmentation n'a pas de défaillance, mais ses chances maximum de toucher sont réduites de −5 %.

L'utilisateur inflige −15 % de dégâts et ne peut lancer que des attaques de base avec une arme à deux mains dans cette main.
Si l'utilisateur subit un traumatisme, cette augmentation n'a pas de défaillance, mais ses chances maximum de toucher sont réduites de −5 %.

languages.text:
El usuario solo puede realizar ataques básicos con armas de dos manos con esta mano.
Cuando el usuario sufre una aflicción, este aumento no se avería, pero la probabilidad de impacto máxima del usuario se reduce un −5 %.
languages.original_text:
The user deals can perform only basic attacks with two-handed weapons in this hand.
When the user suffers a trauma, this augment does not malfunction, but the user's maximum hit chance is reduced by −5%.

traits.locale_text:
El usuario solo puede realizar ataques básicos con armas de dos manos con esta mano.
Cuando el usuario sufre una aflicción, este aumento no se avería, pero la probabilidad de impacto máxima del usuario se reduce un −5 %.

El usuario inflige un −15 % menos de daño y solo puede realizar ataques básicos con armas de dos manos con esta mano.
Cuando el usuario sufre una aflicción, este aumento no se avería, pero la probabilidad de impacto máxima del usuario se reduce un −5 %.

languages.text:
Der Nutzer kann mit zweihändigen Waffen in dieser Hand nur Basisangriffe ausführen.
Erleidet der Nutzer ein Trauma, hat diese Augmentation keine Fehlfunktion, aber die maximale Trefferchance des Nutzers wird um –5 % reduziert.
languages.original_text:
The user can perform only basic attacks with two-handed weapons in this hand.
When the user suffers a trauma, this augment does not malfunction, but the user's maximum hit chance is reduced by −5%.

traits.locale_text:
Der Nutzer kann mit zweihändigen Waffen in dieser Hand nur Basisangriffe ausführen.
Erleidet der Nutzer ein Trauma, hat diese Augmentation keine Fehlfunktion, aber die maximale Trefferchance des Nutzers wird um –5 % reduziert.

Der Nutzer verursacht –15 % weniger Schaden und kann mit zweihändigen Waffen in dieser Hand nur Basisangriffe ausführen.
Erleidet der Nutzer ein Trauma, hat diese Augmentation keine Fehlfunktion, aber die maximale Trefferchance des Nutzers wird um –5 % reduziert.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, bu elinde çift el silahı varken yalnızca temel saldırılar gerçekleştirebilir.
Kullanıcı, bir travmaya maruz kaldığında bu ogment arızalanmaz ancak kullanıcının maksimum vuruş olasılığı %5 azalır.
languages.original_text:
The user deals can perform only basic attacks with two-handed weapons in this hand.
When the user suffers a trauma, this augment does not malfunction, but the user's maximum hit chance is reduced by −5%.

traits.locale_text:
Kullanıcı, bu elinde çift el silahı varken yalnızca temel saldırılar gerçekleştirebilir.
Kullanıcı, bir travmaya maruz kaldığında bu ogment arızalanmaz ancak kullanıcının maksimum vuruş olasılığı %5 azalır.

Kullanıcı, bu elinde çift el silahı varken %15 daha az hasar verir ve yalnızca temel saldırılar gerçekleştirebilir.
Kullanıcı, bir travmaya maruz kaldığında bu ogment arızalanmaz ancak kullanıcının maksimum vuruş olasılığı %5 azalır.

languages.text:
使用者が与えるダメージが−15%減少し、この手の両手武器では基本攻撃しか行えない。
使用者がトラウマを負った際、このオーグメティックは故障しないが、使用者の最大命中率が−5%減少する。
languages.original_text:
The user deals −15% less damage and can perform only basic attacks with two-handed weapons in this hand.
When the user suffers a trauma, this augment does not malfunction, but the user's maximum hit chance is reduced by −5%.
